title: センター！センター！センター！

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you so much! Be on the lookout for
more Falco!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon manages to secure center stage in a
magnificent winning concert.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...It just doesn't feel real. I can hardly believe it.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm super happy I got to sing in front of everyone.
It felt great to have the spotlight on me.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
The lights the audience was waving... They were
all for me.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Their cheers, their gazes... they were all honed in
on center stage—on me.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I knew winning concerts were amazing. But still...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Singing center stage is somehow even more fun
than I thought!
choice_data_list: It'll be even more exciting on a bigger stage.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I wanna perform on an even bigger stage! I wanna
be a top Umadol!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her first time center stage seems to have
strengthened her resolve to reach the top.
